items.placeName: Phở gánh Hà Nội ( Pho in Shoulder poles )

facebook.caption: Under $15 for a bowl of phở in Phu Quoc. Served the old Hanoi way, carried on shoulder poles right to your table. Phở gánh Hà Nội on 8B Hùng Vương keeps it traditional: rich broth, fresh herbs, zero tourist markup. 4.2 stars across 194 reviews. That number holds up. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the phở arrive on a gánh, shoulder poles and all. This is how Hanoi used to do it. 8B Hùng Vương, Phu Quoc. Under $15 a bowl. 194 reviews don't lie.

instagram.caption: Under $15. Phở served on shoulder poles. Phở gánh Hà Nội brings old Hanoi to Phu Quoc. 4.2★, 194 reviews. Save this.
instagram.video_caption: Shoulder poles. Hot broth. $15. Phở gánh Hà Nội is the real deal on 8B Hùng Vương.

tiktok.caption: Under $15 phở served on shoulder poles in Phu Quoc. Old Hanoi style. 4.2★ #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocFood #PhoVietnam #VietnamTravel

scenes: Vendor lifts gánh shoulder poles
Hot broth poured into bowl
Fresh herbs piled on top
Steam rising, close-up shot
Bowls lined up, busy table
video_script.cta: Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

facebook.caption:
POV: you find a public beach on Bãi Trường that doesn't cost a cent to access.

Sonasea Public Beach sits right on one of Phu Quoc's longest stretches of sand. No resort wristband. No entrance fee. Just show up, claim your spot, and watch the water.

4.4 stars across 112 reviews. For a free public beach, that's a serious score.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walking onto Sonasea Public Beach, Bãi Trường, no fee, no fuss. 4.4 stars and 112 people agree this one is worth the stop. Free access on Phu Quoc's longest beach strip. Just go.

instagram.caption:
POV: free beach access on Bãi Trường, and it slaps.

Sonasea Public Beach. 4.4★, 112 reviews. No wristband required.

Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: No resort fee. No catch. Just Bãi Trường at its most open. Sonasea Public Beach delivers every time.

tiktok.caption: Free beach on Bãi Trường and it hits different 🏖️ #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocBeach #BaiTruong #VietnamTravel

scenes: Walk up to beach entrance, no gate
Wide shot: long empty shoreline
Feet hit the sand, water in frame
Pan across calm turquoise water
Zoom out: Sonasea signage visible

facebook.caption: 4,663 reviews. 4.5 stars. OCSEN Beach Bar & Club on Hẻm 124 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo keeps showing up for a reason. Cold drinks, sand under your feet, music that actually hits. Budget $15-30 per person and you're set for the night. This is the beach bar benchmark in Phu Quoc right now. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Drinks hitting. Music up. 4,663 people already rated OCSEN Beach Bar & Club and it sits at 4.5 stars. Budget $15-30 and spend the night here. Worth every dong.

instagram.caption: 4,663 reviews. 4.5 stars. OCSEN Beach Bar & Club earns it. $15-30/person for a full night out. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Sand, cold drinks, 4.5 stars. OCSEN Beach Bar & Club is the move tonight. $15-30/person.

tiktok.caption: 4,663 reviews at 4.5 stars. OCSEN Beach Bar & Club is not a drill. $15-30/person. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocNightlife #BeachBar #VietnamTravel

facebook.caption: 8,120 reviews. 4.8 stars. Meliá Vinpearl Phú Quốc keeps showing up at the top for a reason. Located in the Cửa Cạn - Gành Dầu area, this is Bãi Dài beach territory: long, pale sand, far fewer crowds than the south. The rating holds across thousands of stays. That's not luck. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Bãi Dài beach right outside. 8,120 guests rated Meliá Vinpearl Phú Quốc 4.8 stars. Watch the resort from the water and you'll understand why. This end of the island hits different.

instagram.caption: 8,120 reviews. 4.8 stars. Meliá Vinpearl Phú Quốc earns it. Bãi Dài side, fewer crowds, big rating. Save this.
instagram.video_caption: 4.8 stars from 8,120 guests at Meliá Vinpearl Phú Quốc. Bãi Dài beach. Watch this and tell me it's not worth it.

tiktok.caption: 8,120 reviews. 4.8 stars. Meliá Vinpearl Phú Quốc on Bãi Dài. Save before your trip. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocHotels #VietnamTravel

facebook.caption:
POV: you take the wrong exit from Phú Quốc town and end up at a private beach with no one on it.

That beach belongs to Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort. 4.8 stars across 5,997 reviews. Outdoor pool, full spa, 3 bars, and a stretch of sand that feels like it was roped off for you.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch what greets you at check-in: private beach, open pool, 3 bars ready. Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort lives up to every single one of its 5,997 reviews.

instagram.caption:
POV: private beach. No crowds. 4.8★ from 5,997 guests.

Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort hits different. Tag your travel buddy.

tiktok.caption: POV: stumbled into a private beach resort and never left. Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort hits. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocResort #VietnamTravel #TravelTips

facebook.caption:
4.8 stars. 2,576 reviews. Salinda Resort Phu Quoc Island keeps delivering.

Beachfront location in Cửa Lấp. Three restaurants on-site. A full spa. A cocktail lounge. An outdoor pool that actually has space.

This is the kind of resort where you check in for two nights and rebook for two more.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the pool blur into the ocean at Salinda Resort Phu Quoc Island. 4.8 stars across 2,576 reviews. Three restaurants, a spa, and a cocktail lounge, all beachfront in Cửa Lấp. Some resorts earn the rating. This one really did.

instagram.caption:
4.8★ across 2,576 reviews. Salinda Resort Phu Quoc Island, Cửa Lấp. Beachfront. 3 restaurants. Spa. Cocktail lounge.

Tag your travel buddy.

facebook.caption:
POV: you're walking Đường Trần Hưng Đạo and everyone keeps passing Tarapaca Cafe. Don't be them.

4.7 stars across 738 reviews. That's not luck. That's a café that keeps delivering.

Strong coffee, a real sit-down vibe, and none of the tourist-trap noise. Exactly what you need mid-trip.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: 738 people rated this café 4.7 stars on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Watch what you get when you walk in. Tarapaca Cafe earns every one.

4.7★, 738 reviews, Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Tag your travel buddy.

items.placeName: Hoa Đảo Viên Coffee - Phú Quốc

facebook.caption:
215 people reviewed this coffee shop. 4.6 stars. And most tourists walk right past it.

Hoa Đảo Viên Coffee - Phú Quốc isn't on the main strip. That's the point. Local crowd, slower pace, coffee that doesn't taste like it was made for a resort menu.

If your Phu Quoc mornings need a reset, this is the spot.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Locals filling every seat at 8am. 4.6 stars across 215 reviews. Hoa Đảo Viên Coffee - Phú Quốc earns it. Walk in, order slow, stay longer than you planned.

instagram.caption:
4.6 stars. 215 reviews. Most tourists still miss Hoa Đảo Viên Coffee - Phú Quốc.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
instagram.video_caption: 215 reviews, 4.6 stars. The locals already know. Now you do too. Hoa Đảo Viên Coffee - Phú Quốc.

tiktok.caption: 4.6 stars, 215 reviews, and tourists keep walking past it. Hoa Đảo Viên Coffee - Phú Quốc. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocCoffee #VietnamTravel #TravelTips

facebook.caption:
4.5 stars. 317 reviews. HD cafe keeps delivering.

Locals and visitors keep coming back to this spot in Khu 1, Phú Quốc. Solid coffee, consistent quality, and a vibe that earns repeat visits.

Not the flashiest café on the island. Just one that does the job right, every single time.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

facebook.caption: POV: you're walking Đường Trần Hưng Đạo and almost miss the staircase up to Zyzu Kafé. Don't. 4.4 stars across 333 reviews on a coffee shop in Duong Dong. That's not luck. Order, find a seat, stop rushing. Phu Quoc at this pace hits different. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Climbed the stairs. Found Zyzu Kafé waiting at the top. 333 people rated this 4.4 stars and most tourists walk straight past the entrance. Your coffee break just got an upgrade.

facebook.caption:
This place fixes burnout.

ANBA COFFEE on 131 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is the kind of café you sit in for two hours and forget you had plans. 4.6 stars across 1,320 reviews. That's not luck, that's consistency.

Good coffee. Good energy. Somewhere between $15-30 a person. Worth every dong.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch someone order, sit down, and visibly exhale. ANBA COFFEE does that. 4.6 stars, 1,320 people can't all be wrong. 131 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, Phú Quốc.

instagram.caption:
This place fixes burnout. ANBA COFFEE. 4.6★, 1,320 reviews, zero pretension.

Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Coffee order lands. City brain finally off. ANBA COFFEE hits different. 131 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo.

tiktok.caption: The café that actually makes you slow down. ANBA COFFEE, Phú Quốc. 4.6★ #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocCafe #VietnamTravel

facebook.caption: Walked down Hoàng Văn Thụ and almost missed it. Tiệm Cà Phê Đồng Giao sits at number 38 looking like a local's front room. 4.9 stars. 31 reviews. Not a tourist trap in sight. This is the kind of coffee stop that makes you rebook your flight home. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Cup hits the table at Tiệm Cà Phê Đồng Giao and suddenly the whole morning slows down. 38 Hoàng Văn Thụ. 4.9 stars. Go find it.

instagram.caption: Walked past. Doubled back. Best call of the trip. Tiệm Cà Phê Đồng Giao, 4.9 stars, zero tourists. Tag your travel buddy.
